title: callitriche anceps subsp. subanceps
intro: Callitriche anceps subsp. subanceps is a plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the water starwort. This aquatic plant is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones and other urinary tract issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Callitriche anceps subsp. subanceps include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote urine production, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or using a tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
